title: papaver dubium subsp. obtusifolium
intro: Papaver dubium subsp. obtusifolium, also known as the obtuse-leaved poppy or meadow poppy, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the poppy family (Papaveraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as pain, insomnia, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Papaver dubium subsp. obtusifolium include its ability to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
